transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: So good morning, please come in.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Good morning Doctor. I have been feeling very tired lately and I'm also feeling thirsty most of the time.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: Okay, I see. How long have you been experienced this symptoms?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: For about two months now, I also feel hungry very often and need to urinate frequently.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: Okay, those can be symptoms of database. It's can you m can you move little? Restate one thing? Okay, okay. So those can be symptoms of diabetes. Have you checked your blood sugar level recently?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Yes, I did a test last week. My fasting blood sugar level was 160 Mg per DL.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: So this is higher than normal. Did you also check your post milk sugar?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: The post meal was around 250 mg per DL, but I haven't checked HBMC yet.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: Okay, based on these readings it looks like you made this type 2 diabetes but we need to confirm it with HBA1C test. I will recommend you few tests.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Okay, doctor, what should I do meanwhile?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: First we need to work on lifestyle changes. So reduce the sugar and redefined carbohydrates and eat more vegetables, whole grains and proteins and try to work within at least 40 minutes daily.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Do I need to take medicines?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: I will start you on meditation after reviewing your HPA HP1C report. For now, focus on the diet and exercise.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: So it usually cannot be completely cured but it can be controlled very well with your proper diet exercise and meditation.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Okay doctor, I will follow your advice.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: Great. Please get a test, uh come back in one week with the reports.
